subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! God, exalted be His glory, is All-Loving. His grace encompasseth all things, and likewise His knowledge hath raised up a mighty call [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی حق جل جلاله مهربانست فضلش کلرا احاطه نموده و هم چنین علمش صدائی مرتفع
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @spiritual transformation, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @the power of words; of speech
